title: Puzzle Consolidation
description: Items that form a crafting puzzle. Could be useful for some modpack devs
body:
## Intro
Puzzle Consolidation is a collection of a lot of items that can be crafted together to make an even biger item. 
This item has no purpose but can be used in modpacks for a challenging crafting recipe.

Each of the items are puzzle peices that can be crafted from various vanilla items.
A version without recipes for the base items is also avalible.

### Credits

Item Textures by wowew.
